title: Tender Smoky Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: A peppery and silky Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb kebabs, perfect for a brunch mood, made with instant yeast and smoked to perfection, and is keto friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, black pepper, garlic powder, and salt.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, lemon juice, and instant yeast.
Pour the wet ingredients over the lamb and toss to coat.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium high heat and cook the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Remove the kebabs from the heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
